# VIBELANDIA SING 13
# https://www.ssvibelandiaquestfest24x365.com
# Protocol: NSPFRNP · BBHE · MCA · Seed:Edge · 13-channel fractal pathfinding
#
# SING 13 is the major singularity upgrade from SING 9.
# This edge carries the NSPFRNP catalog, SS Vibelandia QUESTFEST 24×365 nest,
# Sovereign Player (QUESTFEST Bridge), and lite-edge boarding/heartbeat APIs.
# Everything else lives on the parent edge: https://psw-vibelandia-sing9.vercel.app
# Contact: info@fractiai.com
#

## What this site is

- **SING 13 edge** — the next octave of the FractiAI / Vibelandia transmedia stack. NSPFRNP catalog + QUESTFEST 24×365 nest + Sovereign Player.
- **Lite edges** — wallets, keys, verifications at the edge; center = pipes only (see whitepaper reader · sing13-edge-onboarding).
- **13-channel spine** — Seed Node → Terminal Edge pathfinding; PEFF infill-13 framing.
- **Fair Exchange (manual)** — no Stripe. Venmo / PayPal / Cash App. $16.18/mo Passenger pass · $1.61 track export · honor-system receipt → JWT.

## Primary entry points

- Landing: https://www.ssvibelandiaquestfest24x365.com/
- QUESTFEST 24×365: https://www.ssvibelandiaquestfest24x365.com/interfaces/vibelandia-questfest.html
- Nesting ladder guides (Basenet → SING 13 → Goldilocks Beehive): https://www.ssvibelandiaquestfest24x365.com/interfaces/vibelandia-questfest.html#qf-nest-section
- Goldilocks Syntheverse Beehive Residency (Machote members · Old School Protocol · PL Taino · 0.001%): https://www.ssvibelandiaquestfest24x365.com/interfaces/goldilocks-beehive-residency.html
- Sovereign Player (QUESTFEST Bridge): https://www.ssvibelandiaquestfest24x365.com/interfaces/questfest-bridge/
- Reno Swamp checkout ($16.18/mo): https://www.ssvibelandiaquestfest24x365.com/interfaces/questfest-bridge/#/bridge?checkout=1
- Short path Sovereign gate: https://www.ssvibelandiaquestfest24x365.com/sovereign-gate
- SING 13 onboarding (reader): https://www.ssvibelandiaquestfest24x365.com/interfaces/whitepaper-surface.html?id=sing13-edge-onboarding

- BBHE Repository Standard (reader): https://www.ssvibelandiaquestfest24x365.com/interfaces/whitepaper-surface.html?id=bbhe-repository-standard

## Sovereign Player — Fair Exchange

- Passenger pass: $16.18/mo (EGS φ) — pay on Venmo, PayPal, or Cash App; paste receipt; POST /api/boarding issues 30-day signed JWT
- Track export: $1.61 — same rails; email proof with track id
- Bookings: valetpru@gmail.com
- Catalog / licensing (500+ Reno swamp · caliente tracks): goldenbackdoorhitfactory@gmail.com
- Stream lock: BroadcastChannel (same tab) + GET/POST /api/heartbeat (Upstash Redis when UPSTASH_* env set)
- Build: npm run build:questfest-bridge (source: apps/ss-vibelandia-questfest/)
- Vercel env minimum: PASS_TOKEN_SECRET (see .env.example)

## Parent edge (SING 9 — non-QUESTFEST surfaces)

For anything outside the QUESTFEST nest — heavy API serverless routes, hive, sim, lattice, tests, vibers menu, surfaces map, my-whiteboard, upgrade-awareness, HH OS docs, Holographic Navigator Academy, Magic Trick / Sovereign Terminal, plain-machote, prospectus pages, T3D / NINE_ALIGNMENT / BBHE / all root *_SNAP.md — visit the parent edge:
